caption: cyRespond to a property possession claim
title: cyUpload files (optional)
introText: cyUpload any files that you think are relevant to your response. The claimant will be able to see the files you upload.
namingInstruction: cyGive your file a name that explains what it is. For example, 'Receipt of payment from Jane Smith'
uploadHint: cyYou can add more than one file by uploading them one at a time.
